articles.title: Why Do You Need Generative AI To Make Crazy Taxi?
articles.summary: Sega has used generative AI to create the new Crazy Taxi game, which is a major departure from previous versions of the series. This technology was previously only available for developers to use as a support tool, but it seems that Sega has decided to incorporate it into their own games, including this latest installment. While some may see this as a positive development, others are concerned about the impact on creativity and environmental sustainability. The game's developer, Sega, claims that they used generative AI in reference to performers in the game, which suggests that it was not used for localizing or voice acting purposes.
